summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Allspring LT Large Core ETF (ALRG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in large-cap companies in the US, selected through a combination of fundamental analysis and a proprietary valuation framework. ALRG was launched on Jul 7, 2025 and is issued by Allspring.

holdings.n: Allspring Government Money Mar Select Class 3802

holdings.infoBox: ALRG is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 9.47%, Microsoft at 6.40%, Alphabet at 5.87%, Amazon.com at 4.91%, and Broadcom at 4.69%.
